mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL( (SELECT participate_count FROM user_participate_count WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}), 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_participate_count (user_id, activity_id, participate_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activityId}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE participate_count = participate_count + 1
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL( (SELECT bonus_count FROM user_participate_count WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}), 0)
